steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create task/t0020_port_modeldb_189347_gabamod branch from main and write branch_info.txt.

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0008_port_modeldb_189347 and t0012_tuning_curve_scoring_loss_library are completed.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create mandatory task folder structure with .gitkeep files and an assets/library/ subfolder.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped - t0008 already exhaustively researched the Poleg-Polsky 2016 paper, and the gabaMOD parameter swap is documented in t0008's answer asset 'dsgc-modeldb-port-reproduction-report'.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped - no new external information needed; the source HOC/MOD files are already vendored by t0008 and the gabaMOD scalar mechanism is fully documented in the existing materials.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review t0008 library asset modeldb_189347_dsgc and its run_one_trial driver, plus t0012 tuning_curve_loss scorer API, to plan the gabaMOD-swap refactor.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design the gabaMOD-swap driver, the two-point envelope gate, and the comparison-note layout.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped - runs locally on the Windows workstation that t0008 used; no remote compute required.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Build modeldb_189347_dsgc_gabamod library asset, run the 40-trial PD/ND sweep, write tuning_curves.csv and score_report.json.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped - no remote machines were provisioned in setup-machines.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped - mechanical reproduction with a fixed parameter pair; alternative approaches are out of scope and captured as follow-up suggestions instead.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json, costs.json, remote_machines_used.json, and the comparison-note section against the t0008 baseline.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Compare the two-point gabaMOD-swap result against the Poleg-Polsky 2016 envelope and against the t0008 rotation-proxy baseline.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions (e.g., gabaMOD sensitivity sweep, joint protocol combining rotation and gabaMOD swap).

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, mark task.json completed.
